testcase.name: test_routes_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reports_and_pod.py:168: in test_routes_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Routes list failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Routes list failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_driver_portal_pod_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reports_and_pod.py:250: in test_driver_portal_pod_submission assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 422], f"POD endpoint failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: POD endpoint failed: 404 - {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 400, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_orders_have_borough
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reports_and_pod.py:264: in test_orders_have_borough assert response.status_code == 200, f"Orders list failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Orders list failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
